'''''Hilo''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ''Hilo'' was part of the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter's'']] [[Corrupter repair convoy|vital resupply convoy]] lead by the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Frigate]] [[Monitor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Monitor'']]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] cargo was [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]]. ''Hilo'' was attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raiders and was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
